checks.message: part "blind_block" has a 0.439 mm wall — below the 1.2 mm print-safe minimum
checks.suggestion: thicken that region, or lower --min-wall if your printer really handles it. Inspect: solidsight build <model> --views iso,iso_back --focus 273.8,-75.0,92.4,8.0 --slice z=92.4 --out out_focus

checks.message: part "blind_block" has 58074.6 mm2 of faces steeper than 50 deg overhang (worst: 90 deg)
checks.suggestion: reorient the part, chamfer the underside (45 deg cones under bosses), or accept support material. Flat roofs spanning an opening wall-to-wall (port slots, windows) are BRIDGES and usually print fine despite this warning. Inspect: solidsight build <model> --views iso,iso_back --focus 17.2,-103.8,-42.0,12.0 --slice z=-42.0 --out out_focus
